Jeffrey B. Workman, Esq. (415.722.1157) appearing for JOSEPH TULLEY, defendant / moving party

RULING - A R G U E D: Defendant JOSEPH TULLEY'S Motion to Impose Issue and Terminating Sanctions; to Compel Responsse to Production of Documents; to Deem All Request for Admission Admitted; to Deem All Objections Waived; For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $1067.50 is granted in part and denied in part. ATTY. JACOB HARKER, TEL. NO. 624-7602 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT JOSEPH TULLEY.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT JOSEPH TULLEY'Sf Motion To Compel Response To Production Of Documents; To Compel Production Of Documents; To Deem All Requests For Admission Admitted; To Deem All Objections Waived; And For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $1,355 - Motion granted.
